subject: chemistry
title: 19M.1.SL.TZ1.26
question_html:
What is the mechanism of the reaction between alkenes and halogens in the absence of light?

A. radical substitution

B. electrophilic substitution

C. electrophilic addition

D. nucleophilic substitution
examiners_html: Only 33 % of candidates could identify the mechanism type with a large confusion between electrophilic addition and substitution.
